zh.lifeSummary: 當John Welles於1622年出生在英國瓦維其可爾斯圖頓時，他的父親Governor Thomas Welles28歲，母親Alice Tomes30歲。他於大約1642年與Hannah Tuttle在英國結婚。他於1659年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州費艾費爾德史達科特被列為assistant representative to ct gen'l court from stratford。他去世於1659年8月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州費艾費爾德史達科特享年37歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州費艾費爾德史達科特笛卡爾 從雷加納爾 波英 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Welles于1622年出生在英国瓦維其可爾斯圖頓时，他的父亲Governor Thomas Welles28岁，母亲Alice Tomes30岁。他于大约1642年与Hannah Tuttle在英国结婚。他于1659年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州費艾費爾德史達科特被列为assistant representative to ct gen'l court from stratford。他去世于1659年8月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州費艾費爾德史達科特享年37岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州費艾費爾德史達科特笛卡爾 從雷加納爾 波英 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Welles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wells
meanings: English: habitational name from Wells next the Sea (Norfolk) or Wells (Somerset), both named with the plural of Old English wella ‘spring, stream’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a group of springs or streams.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dupuis   ‘from the well’.
History: One of numerous early immigrants from England bearing this name was Thomas Welles, governor of colonial CT, who was in Hartford, CT, by 1636.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Welles was born in 1622, in Stourton, Warwickshire, England, his father, Governor Thomas Welles, was 28 and his mother, Alice Tomes, was 30. He married Hannah Tuttle about 1642, in England. In 1659, at the age of 37, his occupation is listed as assistant representative to ct gen'l court from stratford in Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. He died on 7 August 1659, in Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 37, and was buried in Old Congregational Burying Ground, Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Welles est né en 1622, à Stourton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Governor Thomas Welles, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Alice Tomes, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Hannah Tuttle environ 1642, à Angleterre. En 1659, à l’âge de 37 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est assistant representative to ct gen'l court from stratford à Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il est décédé le 7 août 1659, à Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Old Congregational Burying Ground, Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Welles 1622 in Stourton, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Governor Thomas Welles 28 und seine Mutter Alice Tomes 30. Er hat um 1642 in England Hannah Tuttle geheiratet. 1659, als er 37 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als assistant representative to ct gen'l court from stratford in Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America aufgeführt. Er starb am 7. August 1659 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Old Congregational Burying Ground, Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Welles è nato il nel 1622 nel Stourton, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Governor Thomas Welles, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Alice Tomes, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Hannah Tuttle circa 1642, nel England. Nel 1659, all'età di 37 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come assistant representative to ct gen'l court from stratford nel Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Morì il 7 agosto 1659, nel Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Old Congregational Burying Ground, Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Wellesが1622年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストウルトンで生まれた時，父Governor Thomas Wellesは28歳，母Alice Tomesは30歳であった。約1642年にイギリスでHannah Tuttleと結婚した。1659年，37歳の時，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ファイルフィールドストラトフォードでの職業はassistant representative to ct gen'l court from stratfordと記録されている。彼は1659年8月7日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ファイルフィールドストラトフォードで37歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ファイルフィールドストラトフォードオルド コングレガティオナル ブリイング グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.Old Congregational Burying Ground, Strat: 미국 코네티컷 주 파어필드 스트라트퍼드 드 콘그레가티오널 버이잉 그라운드
ko.lifeSummary: John Welles(이)가 1622년 영국 워윅실르 스토우르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Governor Thomas Welles(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Tomes(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1642년 영국에서 Hannah Tuttle(와)과 결혼했다. 1659년, 37세의 나이로 그의 직업은 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 파어필드 스트라트퍼드에서 assistant representative to ct gen'l court from stratford이었다. 그는 1659년 8월 7일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 파어필드 스트라트퍼드에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 파어필드 스트라트퍼드 드 콘그레가티오널 버이잉 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Welles nasceu em 1622, em Stourton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Governor Thomas Welles, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Alice Tomes, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Hannah Tuttle aproximadamente 1642, em Inglaterra. Em 1659, com 37 anos, sua profissão aparece como assistant representative to ct gen'l court from stratford em Stratford, Fairfield, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Ele faleceu em 7 de agosto de 1659, em Stratford, Fairfield, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Old Congregational Burying Ground, Stratford, Fairfield, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Welles родился в 1622 г. в местности стоуртон, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Governor Thomas Welles было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Tomes, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah Tuttle около 1642 г. в местности Англия. В 1659 году, в возрасте 37 лет,  он работал по профессии assistant representative to ct gen'l court from stratford в местности стратфорд, феирфиелд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер 7 августа 1659 г. в местности стратфорд, феирфиелд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности олд конгрегатиональ буринг гроунд, стратфорд, феирфиелд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Welles nació en 1622, en Stourton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Governor Thomas Welles, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Alice Tomes, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Hannah Tuttle aproximadamente 1642, en Inglaterra. En 1659, a la edad de 37 años, su ocupación registrada era assistant representative to ct gen'l court from stratford en Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Murió el 7 de agosto de 1659, en Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Old Congregational Burying Ground, Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
